privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a fully synthetic OpenProject environment seeded via Ruby scripts in setup_openproject.sh. The 'devops-automation' project and three existing work packages ('Automate SSL certificate renewal with Certbot', 'Kubernetes cluster autoscaling misconfigured', 'Implement blue-green deployment strategy') are hardcoded in the seed data. The targets to be created by the agent, a new work package named 'Sprint capacity planning review' and a wiki page titled 'Sprint Workload Review', are synthetic names directly verified by hardcoded database queries in export_result.sh.
